paragraphs: I'm a dedicated Computer Science and information technologie student with a passion for web development, data science, and artificial intelligence. My journey in tech began when I built my first website in 2nd year , and I've been hooked ever since.

Currently pursuing my Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and information technologie at SRKR engineering college, where I'm maintaining a [ ]GPA. During my academic journey, I've developed strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work effectively both independently and as part of a team.
>Outside of academics, I enjoy contributing to open-source projects, participating in hackathons, and mentoring junior programming students. I'm constantly learning new technologies and approaches to stay at the forefront of this rapidly evolving field. I also love to play cricket and watch movies and more-like to travel and listen to music.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and information technologie
education.institution: Sagi rama krishnam Raju Engineering College
education.description: Focused on software engineering, algorithms, and data structures. Active member of the Computer Science Club and Competitive Programming Team.

am pleased to introduce myself as a student who has successfully completed my Intermediate education at Tirumala Junior College, specializing in the MPC (Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry) branch. During my time at Tirumala, I achieved a score of 958 marks in the IPE (Intermediate Public Examination), reflecting my strong academic foundation in these core subjects. Additionally, I secured a 65% score in the JEE and attained a rank of 15,511 in the EAPCET, demonstrating my competitive performance in these entrance examinations. This journey has equipped me with the knowledge and skills to pursue further academic and professional goals in the field of science and technology.

education.institution: SREE SREE english medium high school
education.description: I am pleased to introduce myself as a student who has successfully completed my SSC at Sree Sree English Medium High School. I excelled in my examinations, achieving a perfect score of 10/10, which reflects my strong academic foundation and dedication during this phase of my education

contact.text: Let's create something amazing together. I'm always open to discussing new opportunities.
